objects.text: Detail-oriented and results-driven Certified Accountant with over 7 years of experience in financial management, auditing, and tax preparation. Proven expertise in streamlining financial operations, enhancing profitability, and ensuring compliance with global accounting standards. Skilled in leveraging advanced financial software to deliver actionable insights and drive organizational success.

• Financial Reporting & Analysis
• Tax Compliance & Planning
• Cash Flow Management

• Budgeting & Cost Control
• Internal & External Audits
• Strong Analytical & Leadership Skills

• Oversaw preparation of monthly financial statements, ensuring 100% accuracy and adherence to deadlines.
• Led a team of 5 accountants to streamline budgeting processes, reducing operational costs by 15%.

• Oversaw preparation of monthly financial statements, ensuring 100% accuracy and adherence to deadlines.
• Led a team of 5 accountants to streamline budgeting processes, reducing operational costs by 15%.

• Improved cash flow processes, resulting in a 30% increase in efficiency at Apex Finance Group.
• Developed an automated invoicing system that saved 200+ hours annually.
• Recognized as "Top Performer of the Year" in 2021 at Larana Finance Group.
